allow: Bash(cd /Users/harshbhat/formbricks; echo "=== lucide imports in MainNavigation ==="; grep -n "from \\"lucide-react\\"" apps/web/app/\\\(app\\\)/workspaces/\\[workspaceId\\]/components/MainNavigation.tsx; sed -n '/from "lucide-react"/{=;p}' apps/web/app/\\\(app\\\)/workspaces/\\[workspaceId\\]/components/MainNavigation.tsx | head; echo "=== useState modal pattern \(openWorkspaceLimitModal\) ==="; grep -n "openWorkspaceLimitModal\\|useState" apps/web/app/\\\(app\\\)/workspaces/\\[workspaceId\\]/components/MainNavigation.tsx | head; echo "=== i18n: is there a whats_new key? ==="; grep -rn "whats_new\\|what's new\\|What's New\\|whatsNew" apps/web/locales/en-US.json 2>/dev/null | head)
